<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "7, ['Premium Insurance Membership (15% discount for all active policies)', 'Corporate Partner Integration service and annual audit', 'Dependents’ Transition Support during relocation or study', 'Executive Concierge & Protection package (24/7 dedicated advisor, family coordination beyond standard concierge services)', 'Entertainment coverage (mentioned under property coverage)', 'Explicit corporate benefit discount calculation (€960 after 15% discount from €725)', 'Request for confirmation receipt to mark portfolio as finalized (administrative acknowledgment not covered)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "18, ['Health insurance plan details (PrimeCare Premium Plan) with cost, rating, deductible, and global coverage', 'Mental health coverage (EliteCare Premium Plan) with therapy, stress management, and psychiatry services', 'Property insurance coverage (PrimeHome Premium Coverage) with luxury items and liability', 'Travel insurance (PrimeTravel Premium Plan) with global assistance, trip cancellation, medical evacuation', 'Wellness programs and gym reimbursement', 'Telemedicine and preventive care coverage', 'Family coverage including spouse and dependents', 'Executive wellness and stress management programs', 'Crisis intervention and family therapy included', 'Coverage tiers and quality ratings (premium, 5-star)', 'Cost breakdown with current and proposed monthly totals', 'Employer benefits and employer contribution inclusion', 'Concierge services and priority claims', 'Digital documentation and confirmation numbers', 'Policy activation confirmation and coverage start date', 'Global and multilingual support', 'Emergency coordination and 24/7 assistance', 'Property coverage for art, jewelry, electronics, and liability protection']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
